title: polypodium thysanolepis
intro: Polypodium thysanolepis, also known as Polypodium leucotomos, is a species of epiphytic fern native to Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, as well as its ability to protect the skin from UV radiation. The health benefits of Polypodium thysanolepis include protecting against skin damage, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include topical creams, ointments, and extracts, which can be used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall health.
